overall.description: A maritime simulator game depicting a first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through a harbor entrance during a nighttime thunderstorm. The vessel proceeds slowly through the channel while lightning periodically illuminates the rain-streaked windows and navigation monitors display radar, chart, and depth data.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge approaching harbor entrance during storm

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the harbor entrance and surrounding water surface

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel toward the harbor entrance while monitoring radar and navigation displays for safe passage

entered.detail: navigation display showing chart data with colored depth contours
circular radar display showing vessel position and surrounding landmasses
blue screen displaying depth sounder and vessel telemetry data
white painted bow of the ship visible through the rain-streaked bridge windows
distant breakwater structure marking the left side of the harbor entrance
distant breakwater structure marking the right side of the harbor entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the ship's bridge with three navigation monitors visible overhead. The vessel approaches a harbor entrance during a nighttime storm, with rain visible on the windows. At approximately 10.5 seconds, a bright lightning flash illuminates the harbor breakwaters ahead, briefly revealing the channel boundaries before returning to darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: navigating through narrow harbor channel between concrete breakwaters

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering the ship through the narrow channel while monitoring the radar for clearance from breakwaters

entered.detail: concrete breakwater wall visible on the port side, appearing on radar and through window
rocky breakwater structure marking the starboard boundary of the channel
faint industrial lights visible in the distance beyond the channel

segments.scene_description: The vessel enters the narrow harbor channel between the breakwaters. The port breakwater becomes visible as a concrete wall on the left, gradually moving closer as the ship progresses. The radar display shows the vessel centered in the channel, with industrial dock lights faintly visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep harbor channel with industrial dock structures

events.description: second lightning strike brightly illuminates the channel walls and surrounding harbor infrastructure

agents.ego_description: continuing through the harbor channel toward the dock facilities, maintaining steady course

entered.detail: large warehouse and crane silhouettes visible on the horizon during lightning flash
red and green channel marker lights visible on the starboard side

segments.scene_description: The ship continues deeper into the harbor channel as another lightning flash at 21.5 seconds reveals industrial dock structures and cranes ahead. The port breakwater remains close on the left, while the starboard breakwater recedes into the distance. Navigation marker lights become visible on the right as the vessel approaches the inner harbor facilities.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates from the open storm-tossed sea into a narrow, industrial harbor channel. It begins with a view of overhead navigation monitors and rain-streaked windows, where a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the distant harbor breakwaters against the nighttime darkness. As the vessel enters the channel, the scene shifts to a tighter perspective with a concrete port breakwater emerging as a close wall on the left while industrial dock lights flicker faintly ahead. The camera continues deeper into the harbor, punctuated by another lightning strike that reveals towering cranes and dock structures in the distance. Finally, the view expands to show navigation marker lights appearing on the right as the ship approaches the inner harbor facilities.
